description:
Configure VeraCrypt to update the modification timestamp of container files when they are modified. By default, VeraCrypt preserves the original timestamp to hide activity. 

1. Go to Settings > Preferences > System Integration (or Security/Default Mount Parameters depending on version) and uncheck 'Preserve modification timestamp of file containers'.
2. Mount the volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/evidence_locker.hc' (Password: 'Audit2024!').
3. Copy the file '/home/ga/Documents/new_evidence.txt' into the mounted volume.
4. Dismount the volume.
5. Verify that the file '/home/ga/Volumes/evidence_locker.hc' now shows a current modification time.
